steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says fish studies showed larger differences on average than bird studies, but in every animal class — including birds — some individual studies exceeded the fish average. The question asks what can be inferred.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: introduces a detail not supported by the passage. ✗
  • Choice B: contradicts the on-average finding for fish. ✗
  • Choice C: makes an unsupported claim about Wysocki's specific study. ✗
  • Choice D — some bird studies found larger effects than some fish studies: if some bird studies exceeded the fish average, they necessarily exceeded fish studies that fell below that average. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
